title: Tactical Reset — Immediate Actionable Changes
framework: 設計 × 心理 × アルゴリズム (Design × Psychology × Algorithm)

honest_progress_audit.title: 1. Honest Progress Audit — Where We Actually Are
honest_progress_audit.overall_verdict: Still pre-launch. 5 followers after 17 days. But the REAL problem is 2 days without posting (Mar 10-11). We broke momentum right when it was starting.

current_numbers.total_engagement_received: 5 likes, 2 RTs, 0 replies, 2 bookmarks across 4 posts
current_numbers.impression_data: Only from old tweets: best was 133 impressions on 'Sleepy' (3 likes = 2.3% impression ER)

what_actually_happened_since_mar9.mar_9: 4 posts published (best day ever). 20 outbound likes, 3 successful replies, 5 follows. First real content day.
what_actually_happened_since_mar9.mar_10: 0 posts. 12 outbound likes, 0 successful replies (ALL 4 failed with 403), 1 follow. Outbound only, no content.
what_actually_happened_since_mar9.verdict: We had ONE good day (Mar 9) then stopped. This is the core problem — inconsistency kills new accounts. The algorithm gave us a tiny test window and we went silent.

outbound_audit.verdict: Likes work fine. Replies are 100% blocked since Mar 10 (X's new-account spam prevention). Follows are HURTING us — each follow worsens the ratio. The 3 successful replies on Mar 9 were the ONLY community touchpoints we've made.
outbound_audit.cost_of_follows: 6 follows added to the already-bad ratio. Net result: profile looks MORE like a bot, not less.

competitor_context.what_5_follower_accounts_should_focus_on: Not engagement rate. Focus on: post volume, profile optimization, image quality, and building any audience at all.

benchmark_accounts.lesson: Ultra-quality images, minimal posts. Every post is a banger. Quality > quantity at this stage.
ONLY 21 posts but 12K followers. One viral post (16K likes) changed everything. Quality is the multiplier.

benchmark_accounts.bio: Just a blonde with a playful side 😇
benchmark_accounts.lesson: 56 posts, 35K followers. 1.2 posts/day. Achievable model for us.

benchmark_accounts.bio: most viral girl on X for a reason 👇
benchmark_accounts.lesson: 20 posts, 695K followers. Explosive viral growth from extreme quality.

changes.problem: Bland, generic, no personality. 'addicted SNS' is grammatically odd and doesn't create curiosity. Compare to competitors: @IsabellaCruz_47 ('Your favorite Colombian 🇨🇴'), @katekarsyn ('i just want to play Fortnite'), @Angelwithcakee ('Just a blonde with a playful side 😇').
recommended_bios: just a girl who looks too good in mirror selfies 🪞
i look better in person trust me
tokyo girl with a coffee addiction ☕ more of me ⬇️
changes.bio_principles: Under 50 chars. ONE personality trait. Casual lowercase. Creates curiosity or mild provocation. Never mention AI. Never list traits (age + nationality + hobby = resume, not personality).
changes.operator_action: Pick one of the above or write a variant. Update via X app immediately.

changes.problem: Follower:following ratio is 5:33. This is the #1 bot signal on our profile. Every automated follow makes it worse. Top performers: @sessypuuh follows 8, @katekarsyn follows 3, @nene__chandayo follows 0. We follow 33.
changes.fix: 1) Disable follow actions in outbound config. 2) Manually unfollow all accounts except 3-5 that are either real community connections or aspirational peers. Target: following ≤ 5.
changes.operator_action: Go to X app → Following list → Unfollow everyone except 3-5 accounts you want to keep. Then confirm to Marc that follows are disabled.

changes.problem: 2 consecutive days of silence (Mar 10-11). The algorithm penalizes inconsistency, especially for new accounts. Every day without a post is a step backward.
changes.fix: Generate and post 3 high-quality image posts today at: 18:00 JST, 20:00 JST, 22:00 JST (evening block to catch US morning + JP prime time). Even if times aren't perfect, POSTING > perfect timing.

content_suggestions.caption: be honest with me rn 👀
content_suggestions.notes: Provocative question format. Under 30 chars. Forces mental response.

content_suggestions.caption: not my best angle or whatever
content_suggestions.notes: False modesty + confidence. Creates curiosity (is it actually great?). Under 30 chars.

content_suggestions.caption: .@grok turn me into a 90s anime character
content_suggestions.notes: Creative Grok prompt that creates curiosity gap. More entertaining than 'remove white'.

changes.operator_action: Approve these 3 posts via Telegram. Marc will generate images and publish immediately.

changes.problem: No pinned post. When someone visits our profile, they see a thin feed of 10 posts. A pinned best post gives visitors the strongest first impression.
changes.fix: Pin the post 'Am I your type? 👀' (tweet ID 2031060275047313555) — it's our highest-engagement post with 2 likes, 1 RT, 1 bookmark. Not great, but it's the best we have and the caption + image format is strong.

changes.problem: Zero manual engagement from operator so far. API replies are 100% blocked. The ONLY way to build community presence right now is manual engagement from phone/browser. This was declared non-negotiable on Mar 10 and still hasn't happened.
changes.fix: Spend 15 minutes on X from phone. Like 15-20 posts from AI beauty accounts. Reply manually to 3-5 posts (bypasses API restriction). Reply to any engagement on our own posts. Like posts from accounts we've followed.
changes.operator_action: Open X app. Search for recent posts from: @sessypuuh, @Angelwithcakee, @yogana_19, @HannaJonso, @baharaykin. Like their posts. Reply with genuine comments about specific details in their images. Check our own posts for any engagement and respond immediately.

changes.action: OUTBOUND: LIKES ONLY, NO FOLLOWS, NO API REPLIES
changes.problem: Automated follows worsen ratio. API replies fail 100%. Only likes reliably work and create notifications that might draw profile visits.
changes.fix: Outbound strategy: 25-30 likes/day on target accounts. ZERO follows. ZERO API replies. All reply engagement via operator manual only.
changes.selection_rationale: Fresh targets not engaged in last 3 days. Mix of mid-tier (13K-81K) EN accounts with clean timelines and high engagement. Likes on their posts create notifications that might lead to profile visits.

framework_analysis.title: 3. 設計 × 心理 × アルゴリズム — Updated Scores
framework_analysis.overall: Design=5, Psychology=3, Algorithm=2. Product = 5×3×2 = 30 out of 1000. Previous was 4×3×2=24. Marginal improvement from better captions, but still fundamentally broken.

design.what_works: Short captions, zero hashtags, content pillar categories all correct. Image prompts are detailed and well-structured.
what_doesnt: Bio is generic — fails the '3-second profile test'
No pinned post — wasted profile real estate
Image quality unknown — no side-by-side comparison with competitors done yet
design.immediate_fixes: Bio rewrite (FIX-01), unfollow cleanup (FIX-02), pin best post (FIX-04). These three take 10 minutes and significantly improve profile conversion.

psychology.what_works: Provocative question format ('Am I your type?') outperformed other styles. Shows the psychology lever IS there.
what_doesnt: Captions are hooks that hook into nothing — no character depth yet
Zero dwell time optimization — single image + 5 words = scroll past in 1 second
Outbound replies are generic bot-sounding templates ('genuinely stunning work')
No emotional arc between posts — each post is disconnected
tactical_fixes_skip_persona: Use dwell-time captions: 'be honest with me rn' forces mental response (3+ seconds to formulate answer)
Try multi-image posts: 2-4 images per post = swipe dwell time
Make Grok prompts entertaining: '.@grok turn me into a 90s anime character' > '.@grok put me in a bikini' (curiosity gap)
Every caption should force a mental pause, not just announce the image

algorithm.what_works: Posts are getting SOME impressions (best was 133 on 'Sleepy'). The algorithm IS testing us — we're just failing the test.
what_doesnt: Zero first-30-minute engagement — algorithm test fails immediately every time
Posting at dead times — content dies before anyone can see it
2-day silence kills whatever algorithmic trust we built on Mar 9
Follower:following ratio triggers spam detection heuristics
Only 20 posts in feed — too thin for algorithmic categorization
immediate_fixes: Post consistently — NEVER miss a day. This is the single biggest algorithm factor for new accounts.
Post at 12:00, 18:00, 20:00 JST — overlap with JP prime time + US morning/afternoon
Operator seeds every post with a like within 10 minutes — gives algorithm first signal
Fix follower:following ratio — unfollow 28 accounts TODAY

profile_bio_rewrite.title: 4. Profile Bio Rewrite — @meruru_tcbn
problems: Lists traits (age + nationality + hobby) — reads like a dating profile, not a personality
'addicted SNS' is grammatically awkward and not compelling
No curiosity hook — nothing makes you think 'I need to see more'
Too generic — could be any account

competitor_bio_patterns.confident_provocation: @imrubyreid: 'most viral girl on X for a reason 👇' — bold claim that creates curiosity
competitor_bio_patterns.personality_with_hobby: @katekarsyn: 'i just want to play Fortnite' — relatable, specific, memorable
competitor_bio_patterns.playful_identity: @Angelwithcakee: 'Just a blonde with a playful side 😇' — personality + intrigue
competitor_bio_patterns.relatable_casual: @lucidevlinxyz: 'filipina 𓆩ꨄ︎𓆪 i just wanna watch anime and play val' — interests + casual

recommended_options.bio: just a girl who looks too good in mirror selfies 🪞
recommended_options.why: Self-aware confidence. References our actual content style (mirror selfies). Playful tone. 52 chars.
Bold, short, creates intrigue. Keeps the moon emoji from current brand. 30 chars.

recommended_options.bio: i look better in person trust me
recommended_options.why: Playful false modesty. Creates curiosity. Casual lowercase. 33 chars. No emoji.

recommended_options.bio: tokyo girl ☕ addicted to mirror selfies
recommended_options.why: Location + specific interest. More specific than current bio. 40 chars.

dont_include: links (not until we have exclusive content)

content_volume_rampup.title: 5. Content Volume Ramp-Up Plan

current_state.average_per_day: 0.8 posts/day over 5 active days (far below target of 3-4)
current_state.best_day: Mar 9: 4 posts (our only day at target)

content_volume_rampup.foundation_threshold: 30-50 posts with images. Currently at ~4 image posts. We need 26-46 more.

ramp_schedule.note: Recovery day. Get back on track. Even late-day posting is better than silence.
Establish 3/day baseline. Focus on image quality over everything. Every post must have a high-quality Higgsfield image.
Scale to 4/day. Should hit 30+ image posts by Mar 18.
Maintain cadence. Never drop below 3/day. Quality > quantity if forced to choose.

projected_totals.by_mar_14: ~20 + 12 = 32 total posts (including today's 3 + 3/day for 3 more days)

content_volume_rampup.image_pipeline: Need to batch-generate images. Sunday sprint: generate 30+ images, curate to best 20. Maintain a 5-day image buffer. Don't let image generation be a bottleneck.

content_mix_per_day.note: Skip self_quote_chains until we have 30+ posts. Premature at current volume.

outbound_quality_improvement.title: 6. Outbound Quality Improvement
current_problems: Reply templates are generic: 'genuinely stunning work', 'the lighting in this is actually insane' — these sound like bot comments
API replies are 100% blocked since Mar 10 — the mechanism is broken
Automated follows are worsening our profile ratio
No manual engagement from operator — the only working reply channel

automated.likes: 25-30/day on target accounts. This works and creates profile-visit notifications.
automated.follows: ZERO until follower:following ratio exceeds 3:1 (need 100+ followers before resuming at 2/day)
automated.replies: ZERO via API until restriction lifts. All replies via operator manual.

manual_operator.daily_time: 15 minutes, split into two 7-min sessions at 12:15 and 18:15 JST
manual_operator.session_1: Like 10 posts from target accounts. Reply to 2-3 with specific comments.
manual_operator.session_2: Like 5-10 posts. Reply to 1-2. Check our own posts for any engagement and respond.
reply_quality_rules: Reference ONE specific thing in the image: the outfit, the setting, the lighting angle, the color palette
Ask a question about the specific content: 'where is this?', 'what filter gives that warm tone?'
example_good_replies: the way the sunset hits the earrings in this one >>
okay but that mirror angle is actually genius
going from white to red in the last two posts was a power move
wait is this the same rooftop from last week? the light is completely different
example_bad_replies: the lighting in this is actually insane (could apply to anything)
wait this is actually stunning (empty compliment)
this cosplay is next level honestly (vague)

target_rotation.principle: Rotate through all 26 EN competitors over 7 days. Never engage the same account 2 days in a row. Mix large (>50K) and small (<20K) accounts.

posting_strategy_dwell_time.title: 7. Posting Strategy — Dwell Time Optimization
posting_strategy_dwell_time.why_dwell_time_matters: X's algorithm heavily weights dwell time (time spent looking at a post). Our current posts are consumed in <2 seconds: single image + 5-word caption = scroll past. We need posts that make people STOP.

current_posting_times.problem: 3 of 4 posts in dead zones. Zero posts in the 12-14h or 17-21h JST windows where JP users and US users overlap.

new_posting_times.audience: JP prime time + US late morning
JP afternoon + US West late night
new_posting_times.note: Add this slot only at 4/day cadence (from Mar 15)

examples: you weren't supposed to see this one
dwell_time_tactics.why: Forces mental formulation of a response. 3-5 seconds of dwell time just reading and thinking.

dwell_time_tactics.implementation: Post 2-4 images in one tweet. Different angles, different outfits, or a mini photo-story.
dwell_time_tactics.why: Each swipe = additional dwell time. Algorithm sees extended interaction.
dwell_time_tactics.target: At least 1 multi-image post per day starting Mar 12

good_prompts: .@grok turn me into a 90s anime character
.@grok put me in a studio ghibli movie
.@grok what would I look like as a villain
dwell_time_tactics.why: Creative Grok requests create a 'what will happen?' curiosity gap. Boring requests don't.

dwell_time_tactics.implementation: Images should have at least ONE element worth zooming in on: jewelry detail, reflection, background object, texture in clothing.
dwell_time_tactics.why: Pinch-to-zoom = high dwell time signal to algorithm.
dwell_time_tactics.priority: Include in every image prompt — add specific detail-rich elements

updated_daily_action_checklist.title: 8. Updated Daily Action Checklist

daily_routine.action: Operator reviews content plan in Telegram
Marc triggers publishing for approved posts
Operator manual engagement session #1 — like 10 posts, reply to 2-3
Post #2 goes live (grok_interactive) — only on 4/day days
Operator manual engagement session #2 — like 5-10 posts, reply to 1-2
Automated outbound — 25 likes on target accounts (NO follows, NO replies)

updated_daily_action_checklist.operator_daily_total: ~22 minutes (5 review + 1+7+1+7+1 engagement). This is the minimum viable investment.
updated_daily_action_checklist.automated_daily_total: 3-4 posts published, 25 outbound likes, content plan generation, reporting

targets.note: Double our total post count in one week
Triple from current. Aggressive but achievable with profile fix + consistent content
Better timing + better images + seed engagement should achieve this
Bio rewrite, pin post, unfollow cleanup — all by end of day today
At least one post breaking through the noise
Expect acceleration once profile is optimized and posting is consistent
Check weekly by attempting one test reply

risks_and_dependencies.title: 10. Risks & Dependencies
risks_and_dependencies.critical_dependency: Operator must commit 20 min/day. Without manual engagement, nothing else matters at this stage. The API cannot do what human engagement does for a 5-follower account.

risks.risk: Image quality may not be competitive
risks.status: UNKNOWN — no side-by-side comparison done yet
risks.mitigation: Do a side-by-side comparison of our Higgsfield images vs top competitor images this week. If our quality is significantly lower, all other optimizations are moot.

risks.status: 0/7 days of manual engagement so far
risks.mitigation: Set phone alarms for 12:15 and 18:15 JST. Make it a habit. 15 min total.
Skip API replies entirely. Manual replies only. Re-test weekly.
Pre-generate a 5-day image buffer. Pre-approve content plans. Auto-scheduling if possible. Make posting zero-friction.

executive_summary.one_liner: 5 followers after 17 days. We posted content for 1 day, went silent for 2. Profile signals 'bot'. Fix today: rewrite bio, unfollow 28 accounts, post 3 times, operator spends 15 min engaging manually.
top_3_immediate_actions: 1. Profile fix: Bio rewrite + unfollow to ≤5 + pin best post (10 minutes)
2. Post 3 times today at 18:00, 20:00, 22:00 JST (break the silence)
3. Operator manual engagement: 15 min on X — like 15 posts, reply to 3 (the ONLY working reply channel)
executive_summary.this_week_goal: 21 new posts, 15+ followers, 3/day every day, optimized profile, operator engaging daily
